llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Research chemist
job.description: About The Role Synthesis and scale-up of small organic molecules / intermediates / active ingredients on milligram to multikilogram quantities Planning of synthesis including retrosynthesis and literature search Process development optimization of routes to advanced intermediates/finished products (chemical, physical and preparative). Planning, evaluating documenting experiments, preparing tech transfer documents such as lab development reports, support in tolling related activities Collaborating with cross functional project teams such as research, analytical, safety etc. Adhering to BASF Environmental Health Safety (EHS), HR policies and work practices What We Look For Postgraduate (M. Sc.) in organic chemistry with sound theoretical knowledge in organic synthesis Working experience of 5 to 8 years in chemical / pharmaceutical / agrochemical industry as a chemist Should possess adequate communication technical skills required to perform the job Work Location Navi Mumbai - HO (Innovation Campus
